examples: The old chest exuded a smell of camphor.
Camphor dissolves in alcohol, but not in water.
Water precipitates camphor from its alcoholic solution.
Poppies, Jacob's Ladder, calendula, jasmine, myrtle, stinging nettle, foxgloves, lavender, camphor laurel and irises are in profusion.
King Tang of Shang, had 94 ice men who helped to make a dish of buffalo milk, flour and camphor.
